article_meta.title: News Law & the Courts Black Lives Matter Director Spent Millions in Donations on Homes, Shopping, Vacations, Indictment

reasoning: Generally solid: flags author-prose bias without attributing quotes, with mostly accurate labels. One debatable label on the headline and a minor missed instance, but no systemic issues.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items are from the author’s headline and prose; no quoted/attributed source language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: The headline-as-bias claim is somewhat speculative but defensible; the other two items are clear author-level bias.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed at least one additional biased term in author prose (e.g., 'shopping sprees'). Overall coverage is good but not exhaustive.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: ‘Slant’ and ‘Word Choice’ are appropriate. ‘Bias by Story Choice and Placement’ for the headline is debatable; slant/framing might fit better.
